votes.rationale: Motion-0045 successfully added a deterministic full-fidelity motion snapshot generator for dev-jai-nexus. The exporter now emits a dated full snapshot text artifact and manifest sidecar, preserving complete motion contents instead of degrading later motions into filename-only listings.

The motion stayed tightly scoped and fixed a real portability gap. It did not drift into retrieval or broader bundle redesign, and it now provides a deterministic export path for full motion history, including nested artifacts and explicit branch-aware metadata.

The implementation is coherent, practically useful, and directly aligned with JAI NEXUS durability goals. dev-jai-nexus now has a governed exporter for full motion history that strengthens contextualization for Claude, future agent loops, and multi-chat governance workflows.
